UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Text Ruling

Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Text Ruling

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson, II; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on MAR-06-2013:
Plaintiff SF 1050 POST STREET LLC is represented by Joe Dudley who is present with Attorney Daniel Stern
Defendant TERRY TSIPOURAS is present with Attorney Denise Migrone representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions.

This case does not settle. The trial date of MAR-11-2013 remains on calendar.

Motion To Vacate Default/Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terry Tsipouras, Defendant appearing in propria persona and moving party
No appearance on behalf of plaintiff.

This matter did not make it to calendar. Defendant Terry Tsipouras' Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment is added to calendar; therefore, there is no tentative ruling.

The Court orders defendant to call opposing party's counsel and inform counsel this matter is continued to 11:00AM, FEB-05-2013.

Later this day, the Court grants defendant's motion. Order is signed and filed. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported. (D-501)
